---
title: "Module Audit Report"
subtitle: "snRNA-seq Fetal–Pediatric Lung Analysis"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    theme: flatly
    number-sections: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(yaml)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(targets)

audit_dir <- tar_read(paths)$output$audit
```

# Overview

This report summarizes the audit records generated at each pipeline stage.
Each module writes a YAML, CSV, and Markdown audit file to `outputs/audit/`.

```{r list-audits}
source("R/12_audit.R")
all_audits <- consolidate_audits(audit_dir)
cat("Audit files found:", length(all_audits), "\n")
cat(paste("-", names(all_audits), collapse = "\n"))
```

# Code Fix Log

Issues identified in the original R Markdown and fixed during modularization:

```{r fix-log}
fix_log_path <- file.path(audit_dir, "code_fix_log.yaml")
if (file.exists(fix_log_path)) {
  fixes <- yaml::read_yaml(fix_log_path)
  for (f in fixes) {
    cat("**Issue:**", f$issue, "\n\n")
    cat("**Location:**", f$location, "\n\n")
    cat("**Original:**", f$original, "\n\n")
    cat("**Fix:**", f$fix, "\n\n---\n\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("Fix log not yet generated — run the pipeline first.\n")
}
```

# Per-Module Audit Summaries

```{r module-tables, results='asis'}
if (length(all_audits) == 0) {
  cat("No audit files found. Run the pipeline to generate audit records.\n")
} else {
  for (nm in names(all_audits)) {
    a <- all_audits[[nm]]
    cat("## Module:", nm, "\n\n")
    tbl <- data.frame(
      Key   = names(a),
      Value = sapply(a, function(v) {
        if (is.null(v)) "null"
        else if (length(v) > 1) paste(v, collapse = ", ")
        else as.character(v)
      }),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    print(knitr::kable(tbl, row.names = FALSE))
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}
```

# Session Information

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
